title: Body & Soul
overview: In 'Patrol Cam Live,' a groundbreaking cop TV show shadowing officers across the nation takes a chilling turn when two officers filming a live feed are plunged into a signal-free abyss. As the televised broadcast abruptly ends, the subsequent discovery of their lost footage unveils a nightmarish reality. Lost in the foreboding woods, the officers encounter a sinister night, the unearthed footage exposes a harrowing tale of survival, mystery, and the dark secrets lurking within the depths of the forest.
